Localization.Description: The interaction of the MySQL database with the file system may indicate reconnaissance or an attempt of an attacker to escalate privileges if this is not the standard integration of the database with external systems

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Reading of data from file "{datafield2}" to table {datafield3} of the MySQL database is detected on host {event_src.host}
Reading of data from a file via MySQL database SQL queries is detected on host {event_src.host}
Writing of data to a file via MySQL database SQL queries is detected on host {event_src.host}
